name: Control Water
description: You control any freestanding water within a 100‑foot cube that you choose. While the spell lasts you can select one of four effects: Flood – raise the water level up to 20 feet or create a 20‑foot‑tall wave; Part Water – split the water to form a trench that later refills; Redirect Flow – force flowing water to move in any direction you choose; Whirlpool – create a vortex up to 25 feet tall that pulls creatures toward it, dealing 2d8 bludgeoning damage on a failed Strength saving throw. As an action on your turn you may repeat the same effect or switch to a different one.
